channel.title: ShadowFetch News
channel.description: Late-breaking headlines across every beat — aggregated, organized, and brief-first.

item.title: Mets fans boo Bichette as early strikeouts mount
item.description: Bo Bichette heard his first boos from Mets fans as he has struck out eight times in his first three games. "I thought my at-bats were terrible, too," he said.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: M's Hancock tosses 6 no-hit innings in '26 debut
item.description: Emerson Hancock pitched six hitless innings for the Mariners in his season debut before being removed from the game by manager Dan Wilson.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Ex-Yankee Clay, on '77-78 title teams, dies at 71
item.description: Ken Clay, who won World Series championships with the New York Yankees in 1977-78 to highlight his five-year major league career, has died at the age of 71.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Jays pitchers set mark with 50 K's in 1st 3 games
item.description: The Blue Jays started the 50th season in team history by striking out 50 batters in their opening series against the Athletics, setting the major league record for strikeouts in...
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Royals owner admits sense of urgency about lease
item.description: Royals owner John Sherman acknowledged Monday that the Major League Baseball team feels a sense of urgency in deciding where it will play beyond the 2031 season, when its lease...
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Murakami joins DeLauter in elite rookie HR club
item.description: Munetaka Murakami of the Chicago White Sox and Chase DeLauter of the Cleveland Guardians have accomplished something in the last week that had been done only twice before: homer...
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: ⚾ 2026 predictions: Playoff teams, award winners
item.description: Can the Dodgers three-peat? Will Skubal and Skenes win another Cy Young? Our experts make their predictions for the 2026 baseball season.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Passan: How ball-strike challenge rule is rocking baseball -- and who is using it best (and worst)
item.description: Baseball's new ABS system is the talk of the sport. We hand out awards after the first weekend of the rule.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: A historic rookie class? Is Trout back? 10 things we learned from opening weekend
item.description: From early trends to the most -- and least -- surprising performances, what stood out in baseball's return.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Giants' Harbaugh open to possible OBJ reunion
item.description: Free agent wide receiver Odell Beckham Jr. wants to return to the New York Giants. The Giants are at least open to looking into adding Beckham for a second tour with the team.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Shanahan: No 'benefit' for Niners in Aussie trip
item.description: Kyle Shanahan isn't thrilled that the 49ers will open the 2026 season with a trip to Australia.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Lions considering moving All-Pro RT Sewell to LT
item.description: Lions coach Dan Campbell said Monday he's considering switching All-Pro right tackle Penei Sewell to left tackle for the 2026 season.
item.author: ESPN NFL

item.title: Saints: Enough snaps for both Kamara, Etienne
item.description: Saints coach Kellen Moore said Monday there would be enough snaps to go around for running backs Alvin Kamara and Travis Etienne.
item.author: ESPN NFL

item.title: Microsoft’s stock may extend a record stretch of lagging performance that’s ignited fierce debate
item.description: Analysts are divided over whether Microsoft’s diversified business model is a long-term AI advantage or a convenient present-day excuse.
item.author: MarketWatch

item.title: Trump threatens to invade Iran, "obliterate" its energy resources
item.description: Energy markets remain volatile as President Trump threatens Iran with an invasion to seize its oil while also suggesting a deal could soon end the war.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Bitcoin Flashes 'Warning Sign' With Nearly Half of BTC Supply Sitting at a Loss: Report
item.description: Almost half of the Bitcoin supply is sitting at a loss, analysts said, as the top crypto asset remains about 47% off its all-time high.
item.author: Decrypt

item.title: Maryland man charged in $54 million Uranium Finance hacks faces up to 30 years
item.description: A Maryland man could face up to 30 years in prison after prosecutors say he conducted two hacks of crypto exchange Uranium Finance.
item.author: The Block

item.title: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
item.description: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Michigan synagogue attacker committed 'Hezbollah-inspired act of terrorism': FBI
item.description: The man armed with fireworks who rammed his truck into a West Bloomfield, Michigan, synagogue was carrying out "a Hezbollah-inspired act of terrorism," the FBI said.
item.author: ABC News Top Stories

item.title: US embassy reopens in Venezuela months after Maduro abduction
item.description: The US has reopened its embassy in Venezuela, nearly three months after it abducted the former leader Nicolas Maduro.
item.author: Al Jazeera

item.title: Trump approval slips to 33 percent in new survey
item.description: President Trump’s approval rating dipped to a new low, and even fewer people surveyed in a new poll said they support his administration’s war efforts against Iran. In a Univers...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Micron stock sinks 10%, further cratering in post-earnings sell-off
item.description: Since reporting blowout earnings March 18, the memory maker's shares have slid about 30%.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Tony-nominated actor Mary Beth Hurt dies at 79
item.description: Mary Beth Hurt, a Tony Award-nominated actor who starred on Broadway in "Benefactors" with Glenn Close and reunited with Close for the movie "The World According to Garp," has d...
item.author: PBS NewsHour Headlines

item.title: Most Syrian refugees in Germany expected to return home in three years, Merz says
item.description: Merz’s government has taken a tougher line on refugees and migrants, amid surging support for the anti-immigration AfD party.
item.author: BBC World

item.title: JetBlue raises checked bag fees as fuel costs climb amid Iran war
item.description: JetBlue is hiking bag check fees as airlines face higher jet fuel costs related to the Iran war, making flying more expensive.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: This is a reason the Middle East’s major oil-producing countries have been selling their U.S. Treasurys
item.description: A need for liquidity may be playing a role in the decision of some countries to reduce their holdings of U.S. government debt.
item.author: MarketWatch

item.title: Kryptonite for 10 NBA title contenders: Which weaknesses could sink playoff teams?
item.description: We evaluated every playoff contender's biggest weaknesses, how it will impact the postseason and which team is best positioned to exploit them.
item.author: ESPN NBA

item.title: Michigan synagogue attack was Hezbollah-inspired terrorist act, FBI announces
item.description: The March 12 attack on a synagogue in West Bloomfield, Michigan, was an act of terrorism inspired by the militia group Hezbollah, federal officials said at a news conference Mon...
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Brent oil heads for record monthly surge, WTI settles above $100 for first time since 2022
item.description: Oil prices climbed on Monday after Yemen's Houthis said they had fired missiles at Israel, opening a new front in the U.S.- and Israeli-led conflict with Iran.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson unveils privacy-preserving Midnight partner chain
item.description: Midnight maintains its own ledger, consensus mechanism, smart contract environment, and dual-token system.
item.author: The Block

item.title: Online sports betting linked to rising delinquency rates, report finds
item.description: A study from the New York Fed found that delinquency rates increased faster in states where online sports betting is legal.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: ‘I was shoveling sidewalks at 8 years old’: I’m a 73-year-old boomer dad with two kids. Here’s what I teach them about finance
item.description: “My parents knew nothing about finance and investing, so my buddies and I had to figure it out on our own.”
item.author: MarketWatch

item.title: Trump rolls back pause on asylum decisions imposed after D.C. National Guard shooting
item.description: The Homeland Security Department has lifted its total ban on reviewing asylum applications, a pause that affected millions of cases. The pause remains in effect for about 40 cou...
item.author: NPR News

item.title: Allowing Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba ‘not a policy change,’ White House says
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt on Monday said the decision to allow a Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba despite a blockade does not amount to a change in U.S. polic...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Democrats Examine Elon Musk’s Role in Suspension of Business Disclosure Law
item.description: Lawmakers have asked the Treasury Department for information on how Mr. Musk may have influenced the decision to end enforcement of the Corporate Transparency Act.
item.author: New York Times Technology

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Stakes More ETH, Boosting Total to $50 Million
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation staked another $46 million ETH as part of its new treasury plan unveiled last year.
item.author: Decrypt

item.title: WATCH: Leavitt won't comment on reports U.S. landmines have been spotted in Iran
item.description: The White House refused to comment Monday on a report that U.S.-made landmines are being used in Iran.
item.author: PBS NewsHour Headlines

item.title: Rubio denies US actions punitive, blames Cuba for economic failures
item.description: In exclusive interview with Al Jazeera, the US secretary of state downplays US role in the island nation's fuel crisis.
item.author: Al Jazeera

item.title: Karoline Leavitt gives update on Iran talks in White House press briefing
item.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt spoke to reporters Monday about negotiations concerning the Iran war. CBS News White House reporter Aaron Navarro has more.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Fox News host addresses Trump, Hegseth on Iran: ‘Don’t win hearts and minds’
item.description: Fox News host Joey Jones on Sunday urged caution about nation-building in the U.S.-Israeli conflict against Iran as speculation about troops on the ground ramped up. “But I’m go...
item.author: The Hill
